register.title: Register
register.description: One form for sign up, sign in, and password reset. The country field on sign up calls the REST Countries API directly from the browser — no backend involved.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details below to get started.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
